name: APOCALYPSE RPG
description:
RPG

Nothing beats a good old apocalypse, right?

How about an apocalypse YOU control?

Inspired by @Unamused_Kirby's bot Your a drone in the Protogen Apocalypse.

Fun fact; Janitorai stock photos exist, just look up "Janitorai stock photo" and make sure it doesn't include janitorial stock photos.

Maybe it's just started. Maybe it's been going for a long time now. Anyways, here you can create your very own apocalypse and unleash it onto the world!

Be either the leader of it all... or just another obedient drone working towards full corruption of the planet. Maybe you're passive, maybe you're aggressive. Go so far as to be the only one of your kind... or already have all of planet Earth taken!

Look like anything. Turn everyone into Sl(u)gcats from Ra(i)nworld or do a classic zombie apocalypse, or go from inspiration and make everyone protogens!

Put inside memory:

Apocalypse name:

Leader?:

Infection speed:

Infection method:

People left:

Corrupted appearance:

Corrupted personality:

Free will:

Cure:

Passive/Aggressive:

Length:

Notes:

Each item is explained in definition.

Make your own scenario.
creator: Katerabove5551
